TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: cnlangan lalu na alang myan ga llyung Mnibu, b'nux ci urow knkyan myan kya. piyux ci btiyux maki iyik hlahuy kya, kyan mnanak na 'sinuw, ro khoni' bcilung ro gong kwara ro ini mkiyey pu'ing 'sya. llyung Mnibu ga, piyux ci alang nya, alang Stacis ga msyow ci nwalah nya. yabung ro 'cyung pnmahan naha. alang Talax ga knkyan Gokosyo ta, alang Syanox ga cyan muhi ocya bugun. knkyan alang Pnbong ga knahul ana n'inu na cyoli Tayal, maki knkilux na pitung uy. alang Banun ga cyan muhi pagey naha. alang Lmwan ga mtasiy ci 'sya, ro 'cyux 'nyatun naha. alang Pyanan ro alang Skikun ga, cya muhi rami na tamana. alang Sengan ga, cyu mlahang kawey ro s'ayat 'cyux.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨnlaŋan lalu na alaŋ mjan ɣa lljuŋ mniβu, βʔnux ʦ~ʨi urow knkjan mjan kja. pijux ʦ~ʨi βtijux maki ijik ħlaħuj kja, kjan mnanak na ʔs~ɕinuw, ro kħoniʔ βʦ~ʨiluŋ ro ɣoŋ kwara ro ini mkijej puʔiŋ ʔs~ɕja. lljuŋ mniβu ɣa, pijux ʦ~ʨi alaŋ nja, alaŋ s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ ɣa ms~ɕjow ʦ~ʨi nwalaħ nja. jaβuŋ ro ʔʦ~ʨjuŋ pnmaħan naħa. alaŋ talax ɣa knkjan ɣokos~ɕjo ta, alaŋ s~ɕjanox ɣa ʦ~ʨjan muħi oʦ~ʨja βuɣun. knkjan alaŋ pnβoŋ ɣa knaħul ana nʔinu na ʦ~ʨjoli tajal, maki knkilux na pituŋ uj. alaŋ βanun ɣa ʦ~ʨjan muħi paɣej naħa. alaŋ lmwan ɣa mtas~ɕij ʦ~ʨi ʔs~ɕja, ro ʔʦ~ʨjux ʔnjatun naħa. alaŋ pjanan ro alaŋ s~ɕkikun ɣa, ʦ~ʨja muħi rami na tamana. alaŋ s~ɕeŋan ɣa, ʦ~ʨju mlaħaŋ kawej ro s~ɕʔajat ʔʦ~ʨjux.
S.FORM: cnlangan lalu na alang myan ga llyung Mnibu, b'nux ci urow knkyan myan kya. piyux ci btiyux maki iyik hlahuy kya, kyan mnanak na 'sinuw, ro khoni' bcilung ro gong kwara ro ini mkiyey pu'ing 'sya. llyung Mnibu ga, piyux ci alang nya, alang Stacis ga msyow ci nwalah nya. yabung ro 'cyung pnmahan naha. alang Talax ga knkyan Gokosyo ta, alang Syanox ga cyan muhi ocya bugun. knkyan alang Pnbong ga knahul ana n'inu na cyoli Tayal, maki knkilux na pitung uy. alang Banun ga cyan muhi pagey naha. alang Lmwan ga mtasiy ci 'sya, ro 'cyux 'nyatun naha. alang Pyanan ro alang Skikun ga, cya muhi rami na tamana. alang Sengan ga, cyu mlahang kawey ro s'ayat 'cyux.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨnlaŋan lalu na alaŋ mjan ɣa lljuŋ mniβu, βʔnux ʦ~ʨi urow knkjan mjan kja. pijux ʦ~ʨi βtijux maki ijik ħlaħuj kja, kjan mnanak na ʔs~ɕinuw, ro kħoniʔ βʦ~ʨiluŋ ro ɣoŋ kwara ro ini mkijej puʔiŋ ʔs~ɕja. lljuŋ mniβu ɣa, pijux ʦ~ʨi alaŋ nja, alaŋ s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ ɣa ms~ɕjow ʦ~ʨi nwalaħ nja. jaβuŋ ro ʔʦ~ʨjuŋ pnmaħan naħa. alaŋ talax ɣa knkjan ɣokos~ɕjo ta, alaŋ s~ɕjanox ɣa ʦ~ʨjan muħi oʦ~ʨja βuɣun. knkjan alaŋ pnβoŋ ɣa knaħul ana nʔinu na ʦ~ʨjoli tajal, maki knkilux na pituŋ uj. alaŋ βanun ɣa ʦ~ʨjan muħi paɣej naħa. alaŋ lmwan ɣa mtas~ɕij ʦ~ʨi ʔs~ɕja, ro ʔʦ~ʨjux ʔnjatun naħa. alaŋ pjanan ro alaŋ s~ɕkikun ɣa, ʦ~ʨja muħi rami na tamana. alaŋ s~ɕeŋan ɣa, ʦ~ʨju mlaħaŋ kawej ro s~ɕʔajat ʔʦ~ʨjux.
